tagline: Enjoy stress-free pool ownership with a service and maintenance team you can count on across southern Wisconsin.

hero.headline:
Your Pool, Perfected by Wisconsin's
Best Crew
hero.subheadline: With technicians who bring 10 to 30 years of hands-on experience, New Wave Pools keeps your pool crystal clear so you never have to think twice. From spring opening to winter closing, we handle every detail while you just dive in.
checkmarks: Fully stocked trucks for same-day fixes

services.label: Our Services
services.headline: Complete Pool & Hot Tub Care<br class="hidden md:block"> for Southern Wisconsin
services.subtitle: From routine maintenance to complex repairs, New Wave Pools delivers expert care backed by PHTA certification and over a decade of Wisconsin pool experience.

cards.title: Pool Opening & Closing
cards.description: Full-season bookends: professional spring startup with equipment inspection and chemical balancing, plus thorough winterization to protect your investment through harsh Wisconsin winters.

cards.title: Pool & Hot Tub Maintenance
cards.description: Flexible daily, weekly, or bi-weekly plans that keep your water crystal clear and chemically balanced. Real-time updates through our customer portal after every visit.

cards.title: Equipment Repair & Upgrades
cards.description: Heaters, pumps, filters, salt systems, automation — diagnosed and fixed fast from our fully stocked service vehicles. Most repairs completed in a single visit.

cards.title: Vinyl Liner Replacement
cards.description: Free estimates and expert installation of vinyl pool liners to restore your pool's look and prevent costly leaks. Quality materials with a workmanship warranty.

cards.title: Auto Cover Services
cards.description: Professional installation and maintenance of automatic pool covers for safety, energy savings, and everyday convenience. Keep your pool protected year-round.

cards.title: Commercial Pool Services
cards.description: Full-service commercial pool care including opening, closing, and ongoing maintenance with compliance support to meet Wisconsin health and safety regulations.

how_it_works.headline: Three Steps to a Worry-Free Pool

steps.title: Tell Us About Your Pool
steps.description: Call or fill out our form with your pool details. We'll schedule a free on-site inspection and provide a straightforward estimate — no pressure, no surprises.

steps.title: We Bring the Expertise
steps.description: Our PHTA-certified technicians arrive on time in fully stocked vehicles. Cleaning, chemistry, equipment checks — handled with 10-30 years of know-how.

steps.title: You Just Enjoy the Water
steps.description: Track every visit through our digital customer portal. Your pool stays swim-ready all season, backed by our one-year workmanship warranty and satisfaction guarantee.

about.label: Why Southern Wisconsin Trusts Us
about.headline: 13 Years of Expert Pool Care — Backed by Credentials That Matter
about.description: New Wave Pools has been the go-to pool service across the greater Madison area since 2013. Our lead technicians bring 10 to 30 years of industry experience, and every team member is PHTA-certified. We have earned multiple Guildmaster Honors for Service Excellence and Superior Service Awards because we treat every pool like our own.

features.title: Experienced, Certified Technicians
features.description: Every technician is PHTA-certified with a minimum of 10 years of hands-on pool and hot tub experience.

features.title: Fully Stocked Service Vehicles
features.description: Our trucks carry the parts and equipment to handle most repairs in a single visit — no waiting for back-ordered parts.

features.title: One-Year Workmanship Warranty
features.description: Every job is backed by our written workmanship warranty and satisfaction guarantee. If something is not right, we make it right — free.

pricing.headline: Straightforward Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Choose the service plan that fits your pool. Flexible scheduling, transparent rates, and no long-term contracts required.

guarantee.headline: Our "Perfect Pool" Promise
guarantee.description: If you are not completely satisfied with any service visit, call us and we will return to make it right at no additional charge. Every job is backed by our one-year workmanship warranty and our commitment to getting it right — no excuses, no runaround. That is the New Wave Pools guarantee.

faqs.question: How soon can you start servicing my pool?
faqs.answer: Most new clients are on our schedule within 3-5 business days. For urgent needs like equipment failures, we offer priority service from our fully stocked trucks. Call us at 608-444-8850 and we will work with your timeline.

faqs.question: What certifications do your technicians hold?
faqs.answer: All of our technicians are certified through the Pool and Hot Tub Alliance (PHTA). Our lead technicians have between 10 and 30 years of industry experience. We are also active PHTA members and multi-year award winners for service excellence.

faqs.question: Do I need to be home when you service my pool?
faqs.answer: Not at all. Most clients simply provide gate access and we handle everything while you are away. After each visit, you can review a full service report and water chemistry data through our online customer portal.

faqs.question: Do you service commercial pools and hot tubs?
faqs.answer: Yes. We provide full-service commercial pool care including opening, closing, and ongoing maintenance. We also help with health and safety compliance documentation for hotels, fitness centers, HOAs, and municipal facilities across southern Wisconsin.

faqs.question: What areas in Wisconsin do you serve?
faqs.answer: We serve the greater Madison area and southern Wisconsin including Sun Prairie, Stoughton, Cottage Grove, Lake Mills, Chenequa, and surrounding communities. If you are unsure whether you are in our service area, give us a call and we will let you know.

testimonials.name: Jack H.
testimonials.text: New Wave Pools has been maintaining our inground pool for a few years. I have NEVER had a problem with them. I recommend New Wave to all my friends, and am proud to do it, because I KNOW they will be treated right!

testimonials.name: Amanda K.
testimonials.text: New Wave Pools is prompt, efficient, reasonable, and professional. We have used a lot of pool companies and they're the best!

testimonials.name: Kerry R.
testimonials.text: Very good, always available, would recommend highly! Ravin is great and Brad and his crew definitely knows pools — very knowledgeable. Great job New Wave!

contact.subtitle: Get a free, no-obligation estimate from our PHTA-certified team. We will inspect your pool, explain exactly what it needs, and give you honest pricing — no pressure, no contracts.
benefits: One-year workmanship warranty on all work
